ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the states table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Abbreviated state code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "city_salaries" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the cities table */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the industries table */,
  "median_annual_salary" REAL /* Median annual salary in the city */,
  "median_monthly_salary" REAL /* Median monthly salary in the city */,
  "median_weekly_salary" REAL /* Median weekly salary in the city */,
  "median_hourly_salary" REAL /* Median hourly salary in the city */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the city */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index for the city */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the salary data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "city_salary_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the city_salaries table */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made to the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
